title: Co-Design, Equity, and Accessible Participation · Decision Evidence Lens: Access Accommodation
summary: The team invites affected people only after scope is fixed and treats feedback as approval rather than shared problem framing and decision power. Predict the decision, affected people, evidence strength, failure cost, and transfer limit before seeing a worked case. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pp2 access accommodation increment in co-design plan and equity impact record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Budget format, assistive technology, language, schedule, compensation, connectivity, cognitive load, and support accommodations before recruitment.
Choose inform, consult, involve, collaborate, or shared-decision participation deliberately and communicate its actual influence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments

steps.title: Predict Access Accommodation · Theory Access Accommodation
steps.instruction:
theory case — Affected people are invited after scope is fixed, receive inaccessible materials, and never learn which input changed the decision. The theory variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Budget format, assistive technology, language, schedule, compensation, connectivity, cognitive load, and support accommodations before recruitment.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Access Accommodation contract for the supplied data.

For Predict Access Accommodation · Theory Access Accommodation, keep Access Accommodation connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name the stakeholder decision, affected people, authority, assumption, revision, artifact, observable behavior, changed case, rejected failure, accessibility, security, privacy, operation, recovery, contribution, residual risk, and transfer limit; then calibrate the public claim to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Affected people are invited after scope is fixed, receive inaccessible materials, and never learn which input changed the decision. The worked example variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Budget format, assistive technology, language, schedule, compensation, connectivity, cognitive load, and support accommodations before recruitment. A defensible solution applies Access Accommodation, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to co-design plan and equity impact record.

content.code:
workspace: portfolio
project-id: changed-product-2
stakeholder: affected-user review panel
decision: continue only if the changed task meets its outcome and guardrails
artifact: revision-bound evidence packet
claim: one bounded behavior survives the changed context
verify: reproduce the task, inspect the artifact, and compare the predeclared measure
changed-case: different access need, input, constraint, and dependency failure
failure: reject plausible output without causal, human, recovery, or ownership evidence
repair: isolate the first unsupported transition, correct it, and add a regression
owner: named learner and stakeholder reviewer
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research and release environment
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

steps.title: Defend the Access Accommodation model · Theory Access Accommodation
steps.instruction:

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Budget format, assistive technology, language, schedule, compensation, connectivity, cognitive load, and support accommodations before recruitment.
